sections.title: Indications
sections.content:
Temporarily relieves these symptoms due to hay fever or other upper respiratory allergies:

•runny nose,

•sneezing,

•itchy, watery eyes,

•itching of the nose or throat

sections.title: Keep Out Of Reach Of Children.
sections.content: In case of overdose, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away (1-800-222-1222)

sections.title: Dosage
sections.content:
Cetirizine Hydrochloride Tablets, USP 5 mg

adults and children 6 years and over

1 tablet (5 mg) or 2 tablets (10) once daily depending upon severity of symptoms; do not take more than 2 tablets (10) in 24 hours.

adults 65 years and over

1 tablet (5 mg) once a day; do not take more than 1 tablet (5 mg) in 24 hours.

children under 6 years of age

ask a doctor

consumers with liver or kidney disease

ask a doctor

Cetirizine Hydrochloride Tablets, USP 10 mg

adults and children 6 years and over

one 10 mg tablet once daily; do not take more than one 10 mg tablet in 24 hours.

A 5 mg product may be appropriate for less severe symptoms.

adults 65 years and over

ask a doctor

children under 6 years of age

ask a doctor

consumers with liver or kidney disease

ask a doctor

•store between 20°C to 25°C (68°F to 77°F)

•
do not use of imprinted foil inner seal on bottle is broken or missing.

•FDA approved organic impurities test procedure differs from USP

sections.title: Spl Unclassified Section
sections.content:
Drug Facts
Distributed by: Taro Pharmaceuticals U.S.A., Inc. Hawthorne, NY 10532

sections.title: Active Ingredient
sections.content: Active ingredient (in each 5 mL) Cetirizine HCl 5 mg

sections.title: Purpose
sections.content: Purpose Antihistamine

sections.title: Warnings
sections.content: Warnings Do not use if you have ever had an allergic reaction to this product or any of its ingredients or to an antihistamine containing hydroxyzine. Ask a doctor before use if you have liver or kidney disease. Your doctor should determine if you need a different dose. Ask a doctor or pharmacist before use if you are taking tranquilizers or sedatives. When using this product drowsiness may occur avoid alcoholic drinks alcohol, sedatives, and tranquilizers may increase drowsiness be careful when driving a motor vehicle or operating machinery Stop use and ask a doctor if an allergic reaction to this product occurs. Seek medical help right away. If pregnant or breast-feeding if breast-feeding: not recommended if pregnant: ask a health professional before use. Keep out of reach of children. In case of overdose, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away (1-800-222-1222).

sections.title: Do Not Use
sections.content: Do not use if you have ever had an allergic reaction to this product or any of its ingredients or to an antihistamine containing hydroxyzine.

sections.title: Ask Doctor
sections.content: Ask a doctor before use if you have liver or kidney disease. Your doctor should determine if you need a different dose.

sections.title: Ask Doctor Or Pharmacist
sections.content: Ask a doctor or pharmacist before use if you are taking tranquilizers or sedatives.

sections.title: When Using
sections.content: When using this product drowsiness may occur avoid alcoholic drinks alcohol, sedatives, and tranquilizers may increase drowsiness be careful when driving a motor vehicle or operating machinery

sections.title: Stop Use
sections.content: Stop use and ask a doctor if an allergic reaction to this product occurs. Seek medical help right away.

sections.title: Pregnancy
sections.content: If pregnant or breast-feeding if breast-feeding: not recommended if pregnant: ask a health professional before use.

sections.title: Keep Out Of Reach Of Children
sections.content: Keep out of reach of children. In case of overdose, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away (1-800-222-1222).

sections.title: Storage
sections.content: Other information do not use if carton is opened, or if imprinted safety seal is broken or missing see bottom panel for expiration date store between 20° to 25°C (68° to 77°F)

sections.title: Inactive Ingredient
sections.content: Inactive ingredients artificial grape flavor, glacial acetic acid, glycerin, methylparaben, natural and artificial banana flavor, propylene glycol, propylparaben, purified water, sodium acetate (anhydrous), sucralose

sections.title: Questions
sections.content: Questions? Call 1-866-923-4914
